name: migrate_pattern_accountlookup_to_parameters
description: Phase 1: Copy Pattern=1 to parameters $.bank_account=true and AccountLookup to parameters $.iban. Update vw_rekeningnummers to read from both old columns and new parameters (backward compatible).
up: UPDATE rekeningschema SET parameters = JSON_SET(COALESCE(parameters, '{}'), '$.bank_account', true) WHERE Pattern IS NOT NULL AND (parameters IS NULL OR JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.bank_account') IS NULL)

UPDATE rekeningschema SET parameters = JSON_SET(COALESCE(parameters, '{}'), '$.iban', AccountLookup) WHERE Pattern IS NOT NULL AND AccountLookup IS NOT NULL AND AccountLookup != '' AND (parameters IS NULL OR JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.iban') IS NULL)

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_rekeningnummers AS SELECT COALESCE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.iban')), AccountLookup) AS rekeningNummer, Account, administration FROM rekeningschema WHERE Pattern IS NOT NULL OR JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.bank_account') = true ORDER BY administration, Account
down: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vw_rekeningnummers AS SELECT AccountLookup AS rekeningNummer, Account, administration FROM rekeningschema WHERE Pattern IS NOT NULL ORDER BY administration, Account
UPDATE rekeningschema SET parameters = JSON_REMOVE(parameters, '$.iban') WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.iban') IS NOT NULL
UPDATE rekeningschema SET parameters = JSON_REMOVE(parameters, '$.bank_account') WHERE JSON_EXTRACT(parameters, '$.bank_account') IS NOT NULL
